---
id: list-for-date
title: "List EOD compliance verdicts"
description: "Returns all compliance check verdicts produced by the EOD compliance step for the given business date, ordered breach-first."
sidebar_label: "List EOD compliance verdicts"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: reference/api/trms-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List EOD compliance verdicts"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/v1/compliance/eod/{date}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns all compliance check verdicts produced by the EOD compliance step for the given business date, ordered breach-first.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
